summary: M445 — Map: zero dead-ends, mobile combat panel completely hidden. Map: previous in-cap of 2 was saturating on shrinking-column transitions (3→2 / 4→3) leaving some from-nodes with 0 outgoing — the dead-end the user just hit. Replaced static cap with dynamic inCap = max(2, ceil(fromCount*2/toCount)) so 3→2 takes inCap=3, 4→2 takes inCap=4, etc. Added Pass 1.5 that guarantees every from-node has ≥1 outgoing (cap-bypass) and Pass 1.6 that guarantees ≥2 outgoing whenever toCount ≥ 2. Verified across 12 act zones: 0 dead-ends, 90%/238 trunk nodes have ≥2 forward paths (the remaining 10% are nodes feeding the single-node boss column where ≥2 is geometrically impossible). Mobile combat panel: companion row now hidden on ≤700px (.ev-companion-row {display:none}); defensive ev-companion-card chrome zeroed for any future row injection. The bottom .ev-hud no longer expands upward to mid-canvas when a companion is active.
